title: HorrorMP1
description: This project adds many of the spooky scary mods to the game (also has some quality of life mods)
body: A modpack designed to transform Minecraft into a chilling horror experience. It brings together a curated selection of spooky, unsettling, and fear‑inducing mods that overhaul the atmosphere, add terrifying creatures, and create an environment where every night feels dangerous. Perfect for players who want their survival world to feel tense, eerie, and unpredictable.
